TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sinvi ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 128 buwan, 375 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 350 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 25 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 89%, Bunun 3%, Tayan 1%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sinvi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Sinvi hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sinvi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sinvi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sinvi hya' ga Saviki. tay mkyahu' na Sinvi hya' ga Cayamavana. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕin*i ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kaɣi keŋ atu aris~ɕan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, ʦ~ʨou **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕin*i ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕin*i ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕin*i ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕin*i ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕin*i ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕa*iki. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕin*i ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨajama*ana. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sinvi ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 128 buwan, 375 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 350 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 25 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 89%, Bunun 3%, Tayan 1%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sinvi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Sinvi hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sinvi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sinvi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sinvi hya' ga Saviki. tay mkyahu' na Sinvi hya' ga Cayamavana. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕin*i ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kaɣi keŋ atu aris~ɕan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, ʦ~ʨou **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕin*i ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕin*i ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕin*i ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕin*i ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕin*i ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕa*iki. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕin*i ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨajama*ana. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
